title: A Bit More Fun
description: A semi-vanilla Minecraft modpack that makes the game a bit more fun and challenging. Enhanced villagers, enchanting, fishing, adventuring, mobs and more.
body:
![a bit more fun minecraft modpack 3d text title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d25133f875c5881ceebcffac6428b211ff981171.png)

A semi-vanilla Minecraft modpack that makes the game a bit more fun and challenging without adding too many new items and features. Enhanced villagers, enchanting, fishing, adventuring, mobs and more.


## Features - ⚡ Energy - Instead of hunger there is now energy/stamina - 🍖 Nutrition - Heal with food over time ~~and eat a balanced diet~~ - ❄️ Temperature - Keep yourself warm/cool in different environments - 🌍 Seasons & Biomes - Make gameplay more dynamic with four seasons and new biomes - 🏡 Settle - Settle in a village and become a King - ⚔️ Fight - Fight mobs which get stronger the further you venture - ♟️ Bosses - Take down and fight unique bosses - 🎒 Backpacks - Expand your inventory with pouches and satchels - 📑 Organised EMI - Only see items which are useful and are organised in a orderly manner - ✨ Aesthetics - Visual overhaul that makes thing look pretty and immersive - 🔨 Optimized - Includes many performance mods so your PC doesn't explode
If you like the modpack give it a heart ❤ here on Modrinth :)
- - -

Get a lighter version of this modpack, which should be less resource intesive. This modpack has less client-only mods meaning that some visuals might not be as pretty. ~~Get this modpack here.~~ _This version of the modpack is not yet released._

- - -

### Requirements / How to Start 1. Ensure you allocate about 5-6GB RAM in Modrinth App 2. Create your world (with cheats) and run the command `/gamerule doDaylightCycle false` 3. Pre-generate chunks with the command `/chunky start minecraft:overworld square 0 0 400` 4. (optional) Increase the last number to generate more chunks 5. Set yourself into Creative Mode while you wait, just in case. 6. Wait for Chunky to pre-generate chunks. 7. Make sure you enable daylight cycling with `/gamerule doDaylightCycle true` and start playing. > Note: This modpack is currently for singleplayer, but I will get server files up soon.

### To-Do Features/Fixes - Patchouli Wiki book (figure out how to do using data pack) - Resource Pack (mob variants and other aesthetic changes) - Simple magic with a few staves that uses XP (looking for a mod) - Advancement overhaul (maybe quests using patchouli) - Remove HeartyMeals when UI issue is fixed with Energized. Add modded foods to Energized. - Make some swords one-handed only & retexture to look like longswords. Perhaps adjust recipe. - Find alternative to EMI/recipes - _Let me know what other ideas you have..._

Got a question or suggestions? Join the Discord group.
